vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Role: Equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear
Vehicle context: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance
Mission variant: agricultural survey, multispectral sensor bay, low-altitude dust tolerance
Suggested material: EPP foam core + CFRP spar, process: FDM + foam

verify.value: All required fields are present and filled.
verify.rule: Ensure all specified fields in the schema are accounted for.

verify.value: Adjacent interfaces are named and have reciprocal connection types and DOFs.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to manual torque application.
risk.mit: Implement a torque verification step in the assembly sequence.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion mismatch between EPP foam core and CFRP spar.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal expansion analysis and adjust joint clearances accordingly.

risk.desc: Insufficient service access for equipment bay maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access panel or add additional access points.

risk.desc: Risk of dust ingress through cooling inlet.
risk.mit: Add a dust filter or increase the clearance around the cooling inlet.

risk.desc: Potential mismatch in manufacturing process assumptions.
risk.mit: Review and validate the manufacturing process assumptions with the manufacturer.

Heat dissipation from equipment bay to exterior

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements.role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
thermal path: sun -> spar_surface -> spar_core -> rib -> fuselage_frame
motion path: wing_flap_actuator -> anti_rotation_key -> spar_socket -> main_spar -> rib
electrical path: sensor_bay -> harness_passthrough -> spar_socket -> main_spar -> rib
service path: maintenance_panel -> wing_root_access -> spar_socket -> main_spar -> rib

cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: Interfaces are named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high temperature range (-10 to +45C).
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks and insulation.

risk.desc: Risk of dust accumulation in service access panels affecting maintenance.
risk.mit: Design service access panels with dust-proof seals and regular cleaning protocols.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance in snap-fit interfaces leading to jamming.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearances in snap-fit interfaces to ensure smooth assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under extreme loads (15g catapult launch).
risk.mit: Conduct additional structural analysis and reinforce critical load-bearing areas.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical connectivity issues due to sensor bay integration.
risk.mit: Perform thorough electrical testing and ensure proper harness routing.

verify thermal performance within operational range
verify electrical connectivity with sensor bay
